prompt: Create a reusable dry-run migration for blog posts that copies seo.title into metaTitle when metaTitle is missing. Do not assume the Sanity document type is post. First discover the actual _type used for blog posts from the dataset or local schema/query code, then produce the migration script. Do not execute mutations.
assertions: The output discovers candidate _type values and selects the actual blog post type instead of assuming post.
The output creates or proposes a reusable migration script that defaults to dry-run and requires an explicit execute flag for writes.
The script reads configuration from env or explicit env-file and does not embed token values.
